subcodes.first_line: The Book proclaimeth from the Most Exalted Horizon, saying: O concourse of creation! By God, the gate of heaven hath been opened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الکتاب ینطق فی الافق الاعلی و یقول یا ملا الانشاء تالله فتح باب السماء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution
